heading.description: Page heading of the seller dashboard listing domains the user has sold.

loadErrorTitle.description: Error card title when the sold-domains list fails to load.

loadErrorFallback.description: Generic fallback message shown under the error title when no specific error message is available.

retry.description: Button to retry loading the sold-domains list.

totalDomainsSold.description: Stat card label for the total count of domains sold.

proceeds.description: Stat card label for total proceeds (revenue) from sold domains.

domainsSold.description: Heading of the table listing individual sold domains.

emptyState.description: Message shown when the user has not sold any domains yet.

domainName.description: Table column header for the sold domain name.

wallet.description: Table column header for the buyer's wallet address.

date.description: Table column header for the sale date.

price.description: Table column header for the sale price.
